since_last: 58% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.38%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.03% · BTC +0.56% · Gold +0.06% · Nasdaq100 +0.31%. 58% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.38%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.38%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.74%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.74%, MDB +4.10%, CBRS +4.08%, AMBA +3.89%, TER +3.74%. Laggards: DELL -3.51%, ORCL -3.21%, TLN -2.99%, SPCX -2.74%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.74% at $120.59
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
